posts.author: Sebastian123 (Sebastian Strevens)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I was wondering if the timeline sub-item view has been integrated into Monday.com yet? I have seen some people ask previously a couple years ago, but didn’t know if that was a feature that was going to be released anytime soon. If so, what is the timeline for that?

Link to previous post: Sub-Items Timeline

  • Sebastian

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Sebastian!

Yes, you can now use Subitems’ Date & Timeline Columns in the Timeline View! Let us know if you need any help setting this up.
